posts.author: Matthieu_huleux (Huleux)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to use Monday as MSProject :

  • My resources with an occurancy rate
  • A calendar of working days
  • I create tasks with a start date, a dependency or a milestone, a duration and a resource
    and automatically it makes my gantt
    How is it possible ?
    Moreover, I want the progress bar to refer to the percentage of days worked on my projects and not to the status done or not

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Matthieu! Sorry for the late response here!

If you still have questions about this, please reach out to us at support@monday.com and we’d be happy to help you get this set up in your account!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
